notes: v2.5.4 - A big one. Operations Intelligence is overhauled across the board: quotes show the real creator and accept all-or-nothing, client/company editing is cleaner, Customer Requests filters and Careers board saves are fixed, Workforce demand is clearer, and the Employees & Projects detail tabs were reworked for honest data, correct time zones and better accessibility. Traveler and Quality (CAPA) owner names now resolve to the correct person, and CAPA save failures are visible instead of silent. CNC gains a new unified Analytics tab with live shop-floor telemetry over a secure certificate-pinned connection - measured machine runtime beside operator-entered time - and it is display-only by default; nothing writes a status or date unless you opt in. Planner adds a private 'My Work' view uniting your personal tasks and assigned work. Workforce Planner adds multi-window scheduling so a department can work a build in several passes with auto-split hours, and MTF and every build are first-class rows. Projects gets a cleaner Overview & Timeline tab with a focused build-hours modal, and ad-hoc parts can be added again. eBOM/CATIA: no more silent failures when adding parts, a clearer self-recovering CATIA status indicator, and deleting a part no longer blocks re-adding its part number. Security & Monitoring receives CMMC 2 / NIST 800-171 hardening with trustworthy single-source compliance numbers and a real SPRS score.
